setting: A romantic evening at a quiet spot overlooking the city lights.
lyrics:
Da Da Da Da Da- Da Da- Da Da Da Da Da da Da Da
Da Da Da Da Da- Da Da- Da Da Da Da Da da Da Da

No matter what you do,
you know that I will always be there
And you will never leave a voicemail
I'll answer every call you make to me
And if you're ever feeling cold I'll chop your firewood
And when you're feeling bad you know
I'll hold you 'til you're feeling good
'Cuz you got the thing
that makes my heart sing when I'm next to you

And I don't care
How long it takes
Cuz I just care
About the joy you make
In my life, be my wife
I just want you to know

I hope this love lasts forever, ever, ever
I hope this love lasts forever, ever, ever

Whenever I get lonely I make myself remember your smile
And when the rain drops outside,
I picture myself cuddling next you
And if we're running a race you know I'll let you win
I'm carving our names on a tree like back when we were ten
My mouth can't translate the things my heart says
When we're together and you're taking my breath away

And I don't care how long it takes
I swear I swear
For you I'd wait
Anywhere, just say you'll be there
We'll walk hand in hand

And make this love last forever, ever, ever
We'll make this love last forever, ever, ever

So close your eyes and count to ten
I'm not ready you should do it again
Just give me one second 'cuz I
I- I
I got a special message but I
I-I-I
I gotta breathe
Cuz now I can't breathe
I'm takin' a knee...
This ring is a sign, I want you as mine, forever and ever

Da Da Da Da Da- Da Da- Da Da Da Da Da da Da Da
Da Da Da Da Da- Da Da- Da Da Da Da Da da Da Da
Da Da Da Da Da- Da Da- Da Da Da Da Da da Da Da
Da Da Da Da Da- Da Da- Da Da Da Da Da da Da Da

lyricsJa.en: Da Da Da Da Da- Da Da- Da Da Da Da Da da Da Da
lyricsJa.ja: ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ- ダ ダ- ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ

lyricsJa.en: Da Da Da Da Da- Da Da- Da Da Da Da Da da Da Da
lyricsJa.ja: ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ- ダ ダ- ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ

lyricsJa.en: No matter what you do,
lyricsJa.ja: 君が何をしても

lyricsJa.en: you know that I will always be there
lyricsJa.ja: 僕はいつもそばにいるって分かっているよね

lyricsJa.en: And you will never leave a voicemail
lyricsJa.ja: 君に留守電なんて残させないよ

lyricsJa.en: I'll answer every call you make to me
lyricsJa.ja: 君からの電話にはすべて出るから

lyricsJa.en: And if you're ever feeling cold I'll chop your firewood
lyricsJa.ja: もし君が寒ければ、僕が薪を割ってあげる

lyricsJa.en: And when you're feeling bad you know
lyricsJa.ja: 君の気分がすぐれない時は

lyricsJa.en: I'll hold you 'til you're feeling good
lyricsJa.ja: 元気になるまで抱きしめてあげるよ

lyricsJa.en: 'Cuz you got the thing
lyricsJa.ja: だって君は持っているから

lyricsJa.en: that makes my heart sing when I'm next to you
lyricsJa.ja: 隣にいるだけで僕の心を躍らせる何かを

lyricsJa.en: And I don't care
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は気にしないよ

lyricsJa.en: How long it takes
lyricsJa.ja: どれだけ時間がかかっても

lyricsJa.en: Cuz I just care
lyricsJa.ja: 僕が大切に思っているのは

lyricsJa.en: About the joy you make
lyricsJa.ja: 君がくれる喜びだけなんだ

lyricsJa.en: In my life, be my wife
lyricsJa.ja: 僕の人生において、僕の妻になってほしい

lyricsJa.en: I just want you to know
lyricsJa.ja: ただ君に知ってほしいんだ

lyricsJa.en: I hope this love lasts forever, ever, ever
lyricsJa.ja: この愛がずっと、ずっと、永遠に続きますように

lyricsJa.en: I hope this love lasts forever, ever, ever
lyricsJa.ja: この愛がずっと、ずっと、永遠に続きますように

lyricsJa.en: Whenever I get lonely I make myself remember your smile
lyricsJa.ja: 寂しくなった時はいつも、君の笑顔を思い出すようにしているんだ

lyricsJa.en: And when the rain drops outside,
lyricsJa.ja: 外で雨が降っているときは

lyricsJa.en: I picture myself cuddling next you
lyricsJa.ja: 君の隣で寄り添っている自分を想像する

lyricsJa.en: And if we're running a race you know I'll let you win
lyricsJa.ja: かけっこをしたら、わざと君に勝たせてあげるよ

lyricsJa.en: I'm carving our names on a tree like back when we were ten
lyricsJa.ja: 10歳の頃みたいに、木に二人の名前を刻んでいるんだ

lyricsJa.en: My mouth can't translate the things my heart says
lyricsJa.ja: 心が言っていることを、言葉ではうまく伝えられない

lyricsJa.en: When we're together and you're taking my breath away
lyricsJa.ja: 一緒にいると、君に夢中になって息ができなくなる

lyricsJa.en: And I don't care how long it takes
lyricsJa.ja: どれだけ時間がかかっても構わない

lyricsJa.en: I swear I swear
lyricsJa.ja: 誓うよ、誓う

lyricsJa.en: For you I'd wait
lyricsJa.ja: 君のためならいつまでも待てる

lyricsJa.en: Anywhere, just say you'll be there
lyricsJa.ja: どこへでも、君がそこにいると言ってくれるなら

lyricsJa.en: We'll walk hand in hand
lyricsJa.ja: 手を取り合って歩いていこう

lyricsJa.en: And make this love last forever, ever, ever
lyricsJa.ja: そしてこの愛を永遠に、ずっと、ずっと続けよう

lyricsJa.en: We'll make this love last forever, ever, ever
lyricsJa.ja: 僕らでこの愛を永遠に、ずっと、ずっと続けよう

lyricsJa.en: So close your eyes and count to ten
lyricsJa.ja: だから目を閉じて10まで数えて

lyricsJa.en: I'm not ready you should do it again
lyricsJa.ja: まだ心の準備ができていないから、もう一度やって

lyricsJa.en: Just give me one second 'cuz I
lyricsJa.ja: ちょっとだけ待って、だって僕は

lyricsJa.en: I- I
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は… 僕は…

lyricsJa.en: I got a special message but I
lyricsJa.ja: 特別なメッセージがあるんだけど

lyricsJa.en: I-I-I
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は… 僕は… 僕は…

lyricsJa.en: I gotta breathe
lyricsJa.ja: 息を整えなきゃ

lyricsJa.en: Cuz now I can't breathe
lyricsJa.ja: 今は息ができないくらいなんだ

lyricsJa.en: I'm takin' a knee...
lyricsJa.ja: 片膝をついて…

lyricsJa.en: This ring is a sign, I want you as mine, forever and ever
lyricsJa.ja: この指輪は誓いの印、僕のものになってほしい、永遠に、いつまでも

lyricsJa.en: Da Da Da Da Da- Da Da- Da Da Da Da Da da Da Da
lyricsJa.ja: ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ- ダ ダ- ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ

lyricsJa.ja: ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ- ダ ダ- ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ

lyricsJa.en: Da Da Da Da Da- Da Da- Da Da Da Da Da da Da Da
lyricsJa.ja: ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ- ダ ダ- ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ ダ

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: The view is beautiful, but it's nothing compared to you.
sentences.displayHtml: The view is beautiful, but it's nothing compared to you.

sentences.text: You're actually taking my breath away right now.
sentences.displayHtml: You're actually taking my breath away right now.

conversation.japanese: 夜景も綺麗だけど、君の美しさにはかなわないよ。今の君は、本当に息を呑むほど綺麗だ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Stop it, you're making me blush!
sentences.displayHtml: Stop it, you're making me blush!

sentences.text: I'm just happy to be next to you.
sentences.displayHtml: I'm just happy to be next to you.

conversation.japanese: もう、照れちゃうじゃない！私はただ、あなたの隣にいられるだけで幸せよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: No matter what happens, I want you to know that I will always be there for you.
sentences.displayHtml: No matter what happens, I want you to know that I will always be there for you.

conversation.japanese: 本気だよ。これから何があっても、僕がずっと君のそばにいるってことを知っておいてほしいんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: You've always been the one to hold me whenever I'm feeling low.
sentences.displayHtml: You've always been the one to hold me whenever I'm feeling low.

conversation.japanese: そうね。私が落ち込んでいる時は、いつもあなたが抱きしめて支えてくれたもの。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I don't care how long it takes or what we face.
sentences.displayHtml: I don't care how long it takes or what we face.

sentences.text: I just want to keep this joy we have.
sentences.displayHtml: I just want to keep this joy we have.

conversation.japanese: どんなに時間がかかっても、何に直面しても構わない。僕たちのこの幸せをずっと守っていきたいんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: James, you’re being so serious tonight.
sentences.displayHtml: James, you’re being so serious tonight.

conversation.japanese: ジェームズ、今夜はやけに真面目ね。どうしたの？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Emma, you're the one for me.
sentences.displayHtml: Emma, you're the one for me.

sentences.text: I want you in my life...
sentences.displayHtml: I want you in my life...

conversation.japanese: エマ、僕には君しかいないんだ。これからの人生を一緒に歩んでほしい。結婚してくれるかな？

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I want our love to last forever.
sentences.displayHtml: I want our love to last forever.

conversation.japanese: なんてこと、もちろんよ！私たちの愛が、永遠に続きますように。
